_doc: Phase 3 cardinality gate. Structural buckets only — DO NOT add symbols here based on backtest residual deltas. HIP-3 equity perps + ZEC are known high-churn under replay; long-hold natives are exempt.

hip3_equity_perps._doc: All xyz: equity perps. Replay over-trades these dramatically (50-90 opens per 14d). Live tends to hold them as positions through the trading day.

churn_native_exceptions._doc: ZEC has auto_topup watcher + ratchet activity that produces churn equivalent to xyz: equities.

long_hold_natives._doc: Pure mean-reversion natives. Live holds these for days through drawdowns. Cooldown-3600 deleted a structurally valid AAVE trade (-$122 over 71h); explicitly exempt.
